name: Person UGC — 'I just found out I qualify'
description: Front-facing person talking to camera, casual UGC style, sharing personal discovery moment that they qualify for stimulus assistance. Relatable, authentic, problem-aware hook.

name: Shocking Stat — Millions don't know they qualify
description: Bold on-screen stat hook: 'X million Americans are leaving free stimulus money unclaimed.' AI voice or text overlay. B-roll of everyday Americans. Problem-aware agitation angle.

name: Before/After Story — Struggling to Found Program
description: Testimonial-style UGC. Person shares their before state (bills stacking up, didn't know where to turn), discovery moment, and after state (qualified, got assistance, relief). Emotional transformation arc.
notes: Seed concept. Emotional angle — test at Stage 2 awareness.
